products.name: Vanilla Confetti Royale
products.desc: A symphony of vibrant colors and classic European flavors. Handcrafted with pure Madagascan vanilla bean paste and gently folded with jewel-like candied fruits. Its tender, buttery crumb makes it the quintessential centerpiece for joyous birthdays, elegant celebrations, and lively afternoon teas.

products.name: Classic Viennese Marble Torte
products.desc: An artisanal masterpiece weaving together rich, dark cocoa and delicate vanilla sponge. Baked slowly to achieve a flawless marble intertwine, this torte offers a sophisticated balance of flavors. A deeply comforting indulgence perfectly paired with a strong espresso.

products.name: Belgian Cocoa & Walnut Torte
products.desc: Deeply intense and luxuriously earthy. Crafted with single-origin Belgian cocoa powder and studded with toasted walnuts, this cake boasts a dense, fudgy texture that melts instantly on the palate. The ultimate luxury gifting option for true chocolate connoisseurs.

products.name: Madagascar Vanilla Petit Cupcake
products.desc: A delicate, airy cloud of authentic vanilla sponge topped with a whisper of sweetness. These petit delights are baked fresh daily, capturing the essence of a Parisian morning.

products.name: Belgian Chocolate Chip Cupcake
products.desc: Rich, cocoa-infused sponge generously studded with premium dark chocolate morsels. Every bite offers a satisfying contrast of soft cake and melting chocolate drops.

products.name: Velvet Belgian Chocolate Ganache Cupcake
products.desc: A deeply indulgent, moist chocolate sponge crowned with a rich, silky Belgian chocolate ganache. This elegant dessert boasts a profound cocoa flavor that melts effortlessly on the palate, making it a flawless centerpiece for premium celebrations.

products.name: Golden Pineapple Crème Cupcake
products.desc: A light, tropical masterpiece featuring a soft vanilla sponge with a hidden core of vibrant pineapple filling. Topped with a fresh, airy pineapple crème frosting, this cupcake offers a perfectly balanced sweetness.

products.name: Chocolate Strawberry Crème Delight
products.desc: A breathtaking pairing of a rich, dark chocolate sponge and a smooth, vibrant strawberry cream filling. The balanced interplay of deep cocoa and bright berry flavors creates a sophisticated, multi-layered tasting experience.

products.name: Signature Molten Choco Lava Cake
products.desc: A masterful creation featuring a delicate, dark cocoa sponge that gives way to a warm, cascading center of liquid Belgian chocolate. Baked to absolute perfection, this molten delight offers an unforgettable textural contrast. Best enjoyed warm.

products.name: Decadent Molten Lava Ganache Cake
products.desc: An opulent upgrade to the classic lava cake. Breaking the soft, premium cocoa crumb reveals a rush of warm, molten chocolate, beautifully crowned with a thick, hand-whipped dark chocolate ganache. A double dose of chocolate luxury.

products.name: Saffron Milk Cloud Cupcake
products.desc: An opulent fusion of European baking techniques and royal Indian aromatics. Infused with pure saffron strands and rich milk solids, this cupcake offers a delicate, fragrant crumb reminiscent of authentic Rasmalai.

products.name: Fudgy European Brownie
products.desc: Exceptionally dense, crackly on the top, and unapologetically rich in the center. Hand-mixed with high-fat European butter and premium cocoa to create the ultimate textural masterpiece for dessert purists.
